Arrange a Tour

British International School · South Jakarta

A British Education Without Compromise

ISJ is a British international school in the heart of Pondok Indah, offering the English National Curriculum from age 2 through to A-Levels. Our teachers come from the UK's leading independent schools. Every child is known by name.

We are part of The Schools Trust, a UK-registered charity that has founded 16 schools across 11 countries since 2004 — all rated "Excellent" in every category of their government-accredited inspections.

30+

Nationalities

1:5

Early Years Ratio

16

Schools Founded

94%

Outperform UK Average

Ages 2 to 18 · English National Curriculum

Three Schools, One Journey

Pre-Prep

Early Years & Foundation Stage

Ages 2–6. Learning through play, curiosity, and structured exploration. Maximum 15 children per class.

Discover more

Prep School

The English National Curriculum

Ages 7–13. Specialist teaching, co-curricular breadth, residential trips, and a house system.

Discover more

Senior School

GCSEs & A-Levels in Jakarta

Ages 14–18. The only school in Jakarta offering both GCSEs and A-Levels through the English National Curriculum.

Discover more

"High-calibre teaching staff with strong subject knowledge and a real commitment to pupils' learning and wellbeing."

ISJ Parent

Annual Survey, November 2025

Beyond the Classroom

Life at ISJ

A campus in Pondok Indah with a swimming pool, football pitch, theatre, and dedicated creative arts spaces. Swimming from age 2. Sport, music, drama, and art are part of every child's week — not optional extras.

Each year, our older pupils travel to Woolverstone Hall in Suffolk, England — an 87-acre estate where they experience British boarding school life first-hand.

Explore Our Campus

"A warm, family-like environment. The school's strength lies in the kindness of the teachers. My children love all the staff."

ISJ Parent

Annual Survey, November 2025
